name: GH_RuntimeMessageLevel
summary: Indicates the severity of a runtime message.

enum_values.name: Blank
enum_values.summary: No warnings or errors were recorded during solver-time processes

enum_values.name: Remark
enum_values.summary: One of more messages (but no warnings and no errors) were recorded during solver-time processes.

enum_values.name: Warning
enum_values.summary: One or more warnings (but no errors) were recorded during solver-time processes

enum_values.name: Error
enum_values.summary: One or more errors (and possibly any number of warnings) were recorded during solver-time processes.
